overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Spider-Man walking through an autumn urban park and exiting into a city plaza. The clip transitions from a tree-lined path covered in fallen leaves to an open plaza featuring a golden equestrian statue and food cart, with modern skyscrapers visible in the background throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined park pathway with benches and stone walls

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the leaf-covered park path, passing green benches on the right side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing carrying a bag walking past the camera on the left at the start of the segment

entered.detail: tall deciduous trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage lining the left side of the path
tall trees with autumn foliage lining the right side
row of green painted wooden park benches along the right side of the path
low stone wall running along the left side of the pathway
tall glass and steel office towers visible in the background between the trees
stone pillars and metal fencing marking the exit of the park visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a serene park pathway covered in fallen autumn leaves, flanked by trees with colorful foliage and green benches. The path is bordered by a stone wall on the left, with modern skyscrapers visible through the canopy ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with equestrian statue and food vendor cart

events.description: exits the tree-covered park pathway into the open sunlit urban plaza

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continuing to walk forward through the plaza, passing pedestrians in business attire and approaching the street area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark business suit standing in the plaza near the statue

entered.detail: large golden bronze statue of a figure on horseback atop a stone pedestal
food vendor cart with blue and yellow striped umbrella on the left side
red fire truck or emergency vehicle parked on the street beyond the plaza
older red brick apartment buildings visible on the right side
black cast iron street lamp with decorative elements on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Exiting the park, the scene opens into a sunlit urban plaza featuring a prominent golden equestrian statue at its center. Spider-Man walks past a food cart with a colorful umbrella and several pedestrians, while a red emergency vehicle is parked on the adjacent street and modern towers rise in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Spider-Man transitions from a secluded autumn park into a bright, bustling urban plaza. It begins with him walking along a serene pathway blanketed in fallen leaves, flanked by colorful foliage and green benches beside a stone wall. As he moves forward, the canopy of trees gradually thins, revealing the towering silhouettes of modern skyscrapers ahead. The scene then opens into a sunlit plaza, where the camera follows him past a colorful food cart umbrella and pedestrians toward a prominent golden equestrian statue. Finally, the view expands to include a red emergency vehicle parked on the adjacent street, framed by the soaring glass towers of the city skyline.
